overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through Night City during golden hour. The scene features a mix of gritty urban street-level details including palm trees, vending machines, and graffiti-covered buildings, with towering futuristic skyscrapers visible in the hazy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with bus shelter and advertising billboard

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past a green bus shelter, heading toward the downtown towers

entered.detail: modern glass and metal bus shelter with green tinted roof and illuminated interior
large digital billboard displaying advertisements on the side of the street
tall futuristic skyscraper with reflective glass facade dominating the skyline
tall palm tree lining the street, silhouetted against the sunset sky
elevated highway or monorail track crossing above the street level

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city street during golden hour, with the player walking past a green bus shelter and large digital billboards. Tall palm trees line the sidewalk while a massive glass skyscraper looms in the hazy distance, and an elevated overpass spans the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with utility poles and street vending area

events.description: pedestrian with red hat walks past the player in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, passing a pedestrian and approaching a row of vending machines

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing a red hat walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: low-rise residential structure with weathered exterior and metal railings
concrete barrier with metal handrail running along the right side of the sidewalk
wooden utility pole with multiple crossbars and hanging wires
colorful automated food vending machine with 'BURRITO XXL' branding and neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a residential sidewalk bordered by a concrete railing, passing a pedestrian with a red hat. The bus shelter and billboard recede behind as colorful vending machines come into view on the right, with the mega-tower still visible ahead through the palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: street vending area with automated food stalls and graffiti walls

agents.ego_description: walking past a dense cluster of colorful vending machines and food stalls

entered.detail: yellow and black vending machine with 'XXL' branding and snack advertisements
concrete wall covered in colorful street art and murals
large mural painted on a building depicting an american flag with stars and stripes

segments.scene_description: The player passes a row of brightly lit vending machines including a Burrito XXL stall, transitioning into an area with heavy graffiti art. An American flag mural becomes visible on a building ahead as the residential structures give way to more industrial street art.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with holographic advertising and palm tree lining

events.description: passing the last vending machine and entering a more open residential area with scattered housing

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past colorful residential houses and holographic billboards

entered.detail: colorful single-story houses with varied architecture and rooftop structures
large circular holographic advertisement display projecting above the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wider residential area with colorful houses lining the right side. The vending machines are now behind as the player approaches a large holographic billboard. The American flag mural shifts to the left as the path continues toward a distant overpass, with palm trees continuing to line the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic city street that transitions from a commercial hub into a graffiti-laden residential district during the golden hour. It begins by moving past a green bus shelter and digital billboards under the shadow of an elevated overpass, with a massive glass skyscraper looming in the hazy distance. As the camera advances along a concrete railing and passes a pedestrian in a red hat, the initial billboards recede to make way for a row of colorful vending machines and a Burrito XXL stall. The scene then shifts into a more industrial atmosphere as the residential structures give way to heavy graffiti art and a prominent American flag mural. Finally, the path opens into a wider residential area with colorful houses and a large holographic billboard, continuing toward a distant overpass lined with palm trees.
